zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I於1204年出生在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農希頓時，他的父親Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I39歲，母親Helvise d'IBELIN27歲。他於大約1220年與Eleanor de Courtenay結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1239年登記服兵役。他去世於1270年3月17日在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農صور享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I于1204年出生在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農希頓时，他的父亲Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I39岁，母亲Helvise d'IBELIN27岁。他于大约1220年与Eleanor de Courtenay结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1239年登记服兵役。他去世于1270年3月17日在黎巴嫩素斯 勒班農صور享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I was born in 1204, in Sidon, South Lebanon, Lebanon, his father, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, was 39 and his mother, Helvise d'IBELIN, was 27. He married Eleanor de Courtenay about 1220. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He registered for military service in 1239. He died on 17 March 1270, in Tyre, South Lebanon, Lebanon, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I est né en 1204, à Saïda, Liban-Sud, Liban, son père, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Helvise d'IBELIN, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor de Courtenay environ 1220. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1239. Il est décédé le 17 mars 1270, à Tyre, Liban-Sud, Liban, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I 1204 in Saïda, Liban-Sud, Libanon geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I 39 und seine Mutter Helvise d'IBELIN 27. Er hat um 1220 Eleanor de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er hat sich 1239 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. März 1270 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Tyre, Liban-Sud, Libanon.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I è nato il nel 1204 nel Saïda, Liban-Sud, Libano, il suo padre, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Helvise d'IBELIN, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor de Courtenay circa 1220. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1239. Morì il 17 marzo 1270, nel Tyre, Liban-Sud, Libano, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES Iが1204年にレバノンソウス レバノンシドンで生まれた時，父Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES Iは39歳，母Helvise d'IBELINは27歳であった。約1220年にEleanor de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1239年に兵役登録をした。彼は1270年3月17日にレバノンソウス レバノンصورで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(이)가 1204년 레바논 소우스 레바넌 시던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Helvise d'IBELIN(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1220년 Eleanor de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1239년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1270년 3월 17일 레바논 소우스 레바넌 صور에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I nasceu em 1204, em Saïda, Liban-Sud, Líbano, seu pai, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Helvise d'IBELIN, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor de Courtenay aproximadamente 1220. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1239. Ele faleceu em 17 de março de 1270, em Tyre, Liban-Sud, Líbano, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I родился в 1204 г. в местности сидон, соут лебанон, Ливан, его отцу по имени Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Helvise d'IBELIN, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor de Courtenay около 1220 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1239 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 марта 1270 г. в местности صور, соут лебанон, Ливан в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe de MONTFORT-CASTRES I nació en 1204, en Saïda, Liban-Sud, Líbano, su papá, Guy de MONTFORT-CASTRES I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Helvise d'IBELIN, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Eleanor de Courtenay aproximadamente 1220. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1239. Murió el 17 de marzo de 1270, en Tyre, Liban-Sud, Líbano, a la edad de 66 años.
